description_long: This kiosk is a freestanding, rectangular structure with a dark, stone-like exterior and a prominent digital display screen on the front. The upper section features bold signage reading 'VERDUN' with additional descriptive text below, and the screen displays an image of a hot air balloon scene. Three round buttons are positioned beneath the screen, likely for user interaction, and a box-like receptacle is attached below the controls. The side panels are solid with perforated metal grilles near the lower section, possibly for ventilation or speaker output. The kiosk stands on a flat base and has a flat roof with slight overhangs on the sides, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for public urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas.
description: A modern, freestanding kiosk with a digital display, bold signage, interactive buttons, and a lower receptacle, finished in dark stone-like material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'VERDUN' signage, digital display, three buttons, and a lower box-like receptacle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the flat overhanging roof, and a perforated metal grille near the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back panel and the overall rectangular shape, with the roof and side grilles visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a perforated metal grille and the box-like receptacle partially visible.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with bold text ('VERDUN') and subtitle, placed above the digital display on the front panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight side overhangs, constructed from the same dark material as the body.
